title: agrimonia eupatoria var. suaveolens
intro: Agrimonia eupatoria var. suaveolens, also known as sweet agrimony or fragrant agrimony, is a variety of the agrimony plant, a perennial herb that belongs to the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can aid in wound healing and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of sweet agrimony include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and support the immune system. Sweet agrimony can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health complaints.
